entities.name: ASIAN GRAIN LEGUMES NETWORK
entities.description: A network initiated in 1986 to facilitate the exchange of plant material and technology to increase production of mandate crops in Asia

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: One of the mandate crops of the Asian Grain Legumes Network

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: One of the mandate crops of the Asian Grain Legumes Network

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: One of the mandate crops of the Asian Grain Legumes Network

entities.name: ASIAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: The geographic region where the network's mandate crops are produced

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The yield of mandate crops which the network aims to increase

entities.name: EXCHANGE OF PLANT MATERIAL AND TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The mechanism used by the network to facilitate production increases
